word: G5474 - χαλκολίβανον - chalkolíbanon - khal-kol-ib'-an-on - Fine brass

sections.paragraph:
- Original: χαλκαλίβανον

- Transliteration: Chalkolibanon

- Phonetic: khal-kol-ib'-an-on

- Definition:

1. some metal like gold if not more precious

- Origin: from a compound of G5475 and G3030 (in the implied mean of whiteness or brilliancy)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Neuter of a compound of G5475 and G3030 (in the implied mean of whiteness or brilliancy); burnished copper an alloy of copper (or gold) and silver having a brilliant lustre: - fine brass.
